nasb.text: and not for the nation only, but in order that He might also gather together into one the children of God who are scattered abroad.

esv.text: and not for the nation only, but also to gather into one the children of God who are scattered abroad.

cnv.text: 不但替猶太民族死，也要把散居各地的　神的兒女招聚成為一體。

ccb.text: 祂不单是要替犹太民族死，也要把散居在各处的上帝的儿女聚集在一起。

csbs.text: 而且不仅是替犹太民族死，也是要把神的那些四散的儿女都召集合一。
